features.name: Login y Autenticacion
features.content:
@authentication
Feature: Login y Autenticacion

  As a CRM advisor (asesor)
  I want to authenticate with my corporate credentials
  So that I can access my assigned activities and student records

  Rule: Only users with valid credentials can access the system

    @smoke @critical @p0
    Scenario: Login exitoso con credenciales validas
      Given an advisor with a valid corporate account exists in the system
      When the advisor submits their username and password
      Then the system authenticates the session and loads the advisor profile
      And the advisor is redirected to the customer service home page
      And the session is persisted in local storage

    @smoke @critical @p0
    Scenario: Login fallido con credenciales invalidas
      Given the advisor is on the login page
      When the advisor submits an incorrect username or password combination
      Then the system displays an error toast with title "Error al iniciar sesion"
      And the advisor remains on the login page
      And no session is created in local storage

    @regression @p1
    Scenario Outline: Validacion de campos requeridos en el formulario de login
      Given the advisor is on the login page
      When the advisor submits the login form with <field> left empty
      Then the system shows the validation message "<message>"
      And the login request is not sent to the server

      Examples: Campos requeridos
        | field    | message                          |
        | username | El nombre de usuario es requerido |
        | password | La contrasena es requerida        |

    @smoke @critical @p0
    Scenario: Redireccion automatica cuando el usuario ya esta autenticado
      Given an advisor has an active authenticated session
      When the advisor tries to navigate to the login page
      Then the system redirects them to the customer service home page
      And the login form is never displayed

    @regression @p1
    Scenario: Restauracion de sesion al recargar la aplicacion
      Given an advisor has previously logged in and closed the browser
      When the advisor reopens the application
      Then the system restores the session from local storage
      And the advisor profile data is loaded without requiring a new login
      And the advisor is taken directly to the authenticated area

    @regression @p1
    Scenario: Error al cargar datos de personal tras login exitoso
      Given an advisor provides valid credentials
      When the authentication succeeds but the profile data endpoint fails
      Then the system still navigates the advisor to the authenticated area
      And a warning toast is displayed with title "Datos incompletos"
      And the advisor can continue working with partial data

    @regression @p1
    Scenario: Cierre de sesion limpia todos los estados y redirige al login
      Given an advisor has an active authenticated session
      When the advisor performs a logout action
      Then all session data is removed from memory and local storage
      And the advisor is redirected to the login page
      And the Sentry user context is cleared

  Rule: Expired or unauthorized sessions are handled automatically by the interceptor

    @smoke @critical @p0
    Scenario: Sesion expirada (401) redirige automaticamente al login
      Given an advisor has an authenticated session
      When any API request returns a 401 Unauthorized response
      Then the system deletes the stored token
      And the advisor is redirected to the login page
      And an error toast is displayed with title "Sesion expirada"
      And the message "Por favor inicia sesion nuevamente." is shown

    @smoke @critical @p0
    Scenario: Acceso sin permisos (403) redirige automaticamente al login
      Given an advisor has an authenticated session
      When any API request returns a 403 Forbidden response
      Then the system deletes the stored token
      And the advisor is redirected to the login page
      And an error toast is displayed with title "Sesion expirada"
      And the message "Tu sesion ha expirado o no tienes los permisos necesarios." is shown

features.name: Navegacion y Guards
features.content:
@navigation
Feature: Navegacion y Guards de Rutas

  As an application router
  I want to enforce route access rules based on authentication state
  So that unauthenticated users cannot access protected features

  Rule: Unauthenticated users are redirected to login

    @smoke @critical @p0
    Scenario: Acceso a ruta protegida sin autenticacion redirige al login
      Given an unauthenticated user
      When the user tries to navigate directly to any protected route under "/"
      Then the authGuard intercepts the request
      And the user is redirected to "/auth/login"

    @regression @p1
    Scenario: Ruta inexistente redirige al login
      Given any user
      When the user navigates to a non-existent route
      Then the wildcard route handler redirects to "/auth/login"

  Rule: Authenticated users are redirected away from login

    @smoke @critical @p0
    Scenario: Usuario autenticado intenta acceder al login y es redirigido
      Given an advisor has an active authenticated session
      When the advisor navigates to "/auth/login"
      Then the loginGuard intercepts the request
      And the advisor is redirected to the customer service home page
      And the login page is never rendered

  Rule: The actividadRequired guard protects the detail page

    @smoke @critical @p0
    Scenario: Acceso a detalles de alumno sin actividad seleccionada redirige al home
      Given an authenticated advisor with no activity selected in state or local storage
      When the advisor navigates to the customer service details page
      Then the actividadRequiredGuard intercepts the navigation
      And the advisor is redirected to the customer service home page

    @regression @p1
    Scenario: Acceso a detalles de alumno con actividad seleccionada en memoria
      Given an authenticated advisor who has previously selected an activity
      When the advisor navigates to the customer service details page
      Then the actividadRequiredGuard allows the navigation
      And the student detail view is displayed

    @regression @p1
    Scenario: Navegacion entre features principales del layout autenticado
      Given an authenticated advisor on the customer service home page
      When the advisor navigates to the planificacion section using the sidebar
      Then the planificacion library of flows is displayed
      And the sidebar remains visible with the active section highlighted

features.name: Cierre de Actividad CRM
features.content:
@actividad
Feature: Cierre de Actividad CRM

  As a CRM advisor
  I want to close or reschedule my current activity with an outcome
  So that the student interaction is recorded and the workflow advances

  Background:
    Given an authenticated advisor is on the customer service detail page
    And a student activity is currently selected

  Rule: Closing an activity records the outcome and finalizes the current task

    @smoke @critical @p0
    Scenario: Cierre exitoso de actividad sin reprogramacion
      Given the advisor has selected an outcome (ocurrencia) for the current activity
      And the advisor has entered a call quality assessment
      And a comment is provided
      When the advisor confirms the activity closure
      Then the CerrarActividadUsecase executes with the complete payload
      And the activity is marked as closed in the system
      And the activity is removed from the advisor's pending list
      And a success confirmation is shown to the advisor

    @smoke @critical @p0
    Scenario: Cierre de actividad con reprogramacion automatica
      Given the advisor has selected an outcome that requires a follow-up
      And the system has calculated an automatic rescheduling date
      When the advisor confirms the closure with automatic rescheduling
      Then the FinalizarYProgramarActividadUsecase executes with tipo "automatica"
      And the current activity is closed
      And a new activity is created with the system-calculated date
      And the new scheduled activity appears in the advisor's list

    @regression @p1
    Scenario: Cierre de actividad con reprogramacion manual
      Given the advisor has selected an outcome that requires a follow-up
      And the advisor chooses a specific date and time for the next contact
      When the advisor confirms the closure with manual rescheduling
      Then the FinalizarYProgramarActividadUsecase executes with tipo "manual"
      And the current activity is closed
      And a new activity is scheduled for the advisor-selected date and time

    @regression @p1
    Scenario: Validacion de campos requeridos al intentar cerrar actividad
      Given the advisor has not selected an outcome for the activity
      When the advisor attempts to submit the activity closure
      Then the system blocks the submission
      And validation errors are displayed indicating the required fields
      And no API request is sent to the closure endpoint

    @regression @p0
    Scenario: Error de servidor (500) al cerrar actividad
      Given the advisor has completed all required fields for activity closure
      When the advisor confirms the closure but the server returns a 500 error
      Then the system displays an error toast "Ocurrio un error inesperado. Intenta mas tarde."
      And the activity remains open and the advisor's data is preserved
      And the advisor can retry the closure

    @regression @p1
    Scenario: Obtencion de fecha de reprogramacion automatica segun ocurrencia
      Given an advisor selects an outcome (ocurrencia) that triggers automatic scheduling
      When the system queries for the automatic rescheduling date
      Then the date is retrieved based on the selected ocurrencia and activity cabecera
      And the calculated date is presented to the advisor before confirmation

    @regression @p1
    Scenario Outline: Diferentes tipos de calidad de llamada registrados al cierre
      Given an advisor is closing an activity with outcome selected
      When the advisor selects call quality problem "<problemId>" and quality rating "<qualityId>"
      Then the payload includes calidadLlamada with idProblemaLlamada <problemId> and idCalidadLlamada <qualityId>

      Examples: Calidad de llamada
        | problemId | qualityId |
        | 1         | 1         |
        | 2         | null      |
        | 3         | 2         |

    @regression @p2
    Scenario: Sin conexion a internet al intentar cerrar actividad
      Given the advisor has completed all required fields
      When the advisor confirms closure but there is no internet connection
      Then the system displays a toast "Verifica tu conexion a internet e intenta nuevamente."
      And the activity closure is not submitted
      And the advisor's form data is preserved

features.name: Atencion al Cliente - Ficha de Alumno
features.content:
@atencion-cliente
Feature: Atencion al Cliente - Consulta de Ficha de Alumno

  As a CRM advisor
  I want to access complete student information when working on an activity
  So that I can provide informed assistance and make accurate decisions

  Background:
    Given an authenticated advisor on the customer service home page
    And the advisor selects an activity from their pending list
    And the advisor is redirected to the student detail view

  Rule: The student detail page loads all relevant financial and academic data

    @smoke @p1
    Scenario: Carga exitosa de ficha completa de alumno
      Given the selected activity contains a valid student ID and opportunity ID
      When the student detail page initializes
      Then the AtencionClienteFacade loads the student profile
      And the academic progress (avance online) is displayed
      And the enrolled courses list is displayed
      And the financial traffic light (semaforo financiero) is displayed
      And the payment schedule (cronograma de pagos) is displayed

    @regression @p1
    Scenario: Consulta del semaforo financiero de un alumno
      Given the advisor is viewing a student's detail page
      And the student has a valid alumno ID and classification (idClasificacionPersona)
      When the financial section loads
      Then the GetSemaforoFinancieroUseCase executes with the student ID and classification ID
      And the financial status is displayed with the appropriate color indicator

    @regression @p1
    Scenario: Semaforo financiero falla si falta el ID de alumno
      Given an advisor is on the student detail page
      When the financial section tries to load but the student ID is missing
      Then the GetSemaforoFinancieroUseCase throws "El idAlumno es requerido"
      And the financial section displays a loading error state

    @regression @p1
    Scenario: Consulta de cronograma de pagos por codigo de matricula
      Given the advisor is viewing a student enrolled in a program
      And the enrollment has a valid registration code (codigoMatricula)
      When the advisor opens the payment schedule section
      Then the ObtenerOportunidadCronogramaUseCase executes with the enrollment code
      And the payment installments are displayed in chronological order
      And overdue installments are visually distinguished

    @regression @p2
    Scenario: Carga de avance academico online del alumno
      Given the advisor is on the student detail page
      And the student is enrolled in an online program
      When the academic progress section loads
      Then the getAvanceAonline use case retrieves the matricula date and progress data
      And the percentage completion is displayed for each course module

  Rule: Student requests can be created and tracked from the detail view

    @regression @p1
    Scenario: Carga de solicitudes existentes del alumno
      Given the advisor is viewing a student's detail page
      When the requests section loads
      Then the GetSolicitudesAlumnoUseCase retrieves all requests for the student
      And pending, in-review, and completed requests are shown in separate sections

    @regression @p1
    Scenario: Creacion de nueva solicitud para un alumno
      Given the advisor is on the student detail page
      And the advisor has selected a request type and sub-category
      When the advisor submits a new request
      Then the insertarSolicitudAlumno use case creates the request with the advisor's user ID
      And the new request appears immediately in the pending requests list
      And a success confirmation is displayed

    @regression @p2
    Scenario: Consulta de informacion de empresa asociada al alumno
      Given the advisor is viewing a student who is enrolled under a corporate agreement
      When the company information section loads
      Then the obtenerInformacionEmpresaPorMatricula use case retrieves the company data
      And the company name, RUC, and billing details are displayed

    @regression @p2
    Scenario: Generacion de plantilla WhatsApp desde la ficha de alumno
      Given the advisor is on the student detail page
      And the student has a validated WhatsApp number
      When the advisor selects a WhatsApp template and generates the message
      Then the GenerarPlantillaWhatsapp use case builds the personalized message
      And the generated message is pre-filled in the WhatsApp messaging panel

features.name: Planificacion - Flujos y Actividades
features.content:
@planificacion
Feature: Planificacion - Gestion de Flujos y Actividades de Comunicacion Docente

  As a planning coordinator
  I want to create and configure communication flows for teachers
  So that teacher outreach is automated according to business rules

  Rule: A flujo requires a name, state, and category to be created

    @smoke @p1
    Scenario: Creacion exitosa de un nuevo flujo de planificacion
      Given the planning coordinator is on the flujos library page
      When the coordinator creates a new flujo with name, estado "activo", and categoria "general"
      Then the CreateFlujoUseCase executes and the flujo is persisted
      And the new flujo appears in the library list with estado "activo"
      And the coordinator is redirected to the flujos list page

    @regression @p1
    Scenario Outline: Validacion de campos requeridos al crear flujo
      Given the coordinator is on the create flujo form
      When the coordinator submits the form with <missing_field> empty
      Then the CreateFlujoUseCase throws "<error_message>"
      And the flujo is not saved

      Examples: Campos requeridos del flujo
        | missing_field | error_message                         |
        | nombre        | El nombre del flujo es requerido      |
        | idEstado      | El estado del flujo es requerido      |
        | idCategoria   | La categoria del flujo es requerida   |

    @regression @p1
    Scenario: Creacion exitosa de una nueva actividad de planificacion
      Given the coordinator is on the actividades library page
      When the coordinator creates a new actividad with name and categoria "ejecucion-curso"
      Then the CreateActividadUseCase executes and the actividad is persisted with estado "borrador"
      And the new actividad appears in the library with the correct category label

  Rule: Trigger availability in ConfigurarInicio depends on category and subactivity position

    @smoke @critical @p0
    Scenario Outline: Disparadores disponibles segun categoria y posicion de subactividad
      Given a coordinator configures a subactividad within an actividad of categoria "<categoria>"
      And the subactividad is the <posicion> in the actividad sequence
      When the coordinator opens the trigger (disparador) selection
      Then only the trigger types "<available_triggers>" are available for selection

      Examples: Reglas de negocio de disparadores
        | categoria       | posicion | available_triggers            |
        | general         | primera  | fecha-hora                    |
        | general         | no-primera | ocurrencia-anterior           |
        | ejecucion-curso | primera  | cronograma                    |
        | ejecucion-curso | no-primera | ocurrencia-anterior, cronograma |

    @smoke @critical @p0
    Scenario: Guardado en dos fases al configurar primera subactividad en modo creacion
      Given a coordinator is configuring the first subactividad of a new actividad (id=nuevo)
      When the coordinator saves the configuration
      Then Phase 1 executes InsertarCabecera and stores the returned numeric ID in savedCabeceraId
      And Phase 2 executes insertarDetalleConOcurrencias using the savedCabeceraId
      And the subactividad is stored with its disparador and ocurrencias attached

    @regression @p1
    Scenario: Subactividades adicionales reutilizan el ID de cabecera ya guardado
      Given a coordinator has already saved the first subactividad of a new actividad
      And the savedCabeceraId is stored in ActividadPlanificacionState
      When the coordinator configures and saves a second subactividad
      Then Phase 1 (InsertarCabecera) is NOT executed again
      And the second subactividad is saved directly using the existing savedCabeceraId

    @regression @p2
    Scenario: Duplicacion de flujo existente
      Given a coordinator is on the flujos library page
      And at least one flujo exists in the library
      When the coordinator duplicates an existing flujo
      Then the duplicateFlujo use case creates a copy with "(copia)" appended to the name
      And the duplicate appears in the library in draft (borrador) state

features.name: Mensajeria WhatsApp SignalR
features.content:
@mensajeria @signalr
Feature: Mensajeria WhatsApp - Conexion y Recepcion en Tiempo Real

  As a CRM advisor
  I want to receive WhatsApp messages in real time via SignalR
  So that I can respond to students without page refreshes

  Rule: The SignalR connection is established lazily when first needed

    @smoke @p1
    Scenario: Conexion inicial a SignalR Hub al acceder al modulo de mensajeria
      Given an authenticated advisor with a valid idPersonal and userName in session
      When the advisor accesses the WhatsApp messaging module for the first time
      Then the WhatsappSignalRService initializes the connection lazily (singleton)
      And connects to hubChatWhatsapp_Peru with the advisor's idPersonal and userName as parameters
      And a server timeout of 60 seconds and a keepalive interval of 15 seconds are configured

    @regression @p2
    Scenario: Sin sesion de usuario no se conecta al Hub SignalR
      Given the advisor session does not contain a valid idPersonal
      When the WhatsApp messaging module attempts to initialize the SignalR connection
      Then the connection is aborted with a warning
      And no hub connection object is created

  Rule: Messages are received in real time and forwarded to the correct component

    @smoke @p1
    Scenario: Recepcion de mensaje WhatsApp en tiempo real
      Given the advisor has an active SignalR connection
      When the SignalR hub pushes a new WhatsApp message with a student phone number and message body
      Then the objetoMensaje$ stream emits the InformacionMensajeWhatsapp event
      And the corresponding conversation panel updates with the new message
      And the student's unread message count increments

    @regression @p1
    Scenario: Recepcion de mensaje de planificacion en tiempo real
      Given the advisor has an active SignalR connection
      When the backend invokes ActualizarIntegraWhatsApp via SignalR
      Then the mensajePlanificacion$ stream emits the MensajePlanificacionRecibido event
      And the planning area updates with the new teacher message

  Rule: The connection recovers automatically after transient failures

    @regression @p1
    Scenario: Reconexion automatica tras perdida de conexion SignalR
      Given the advisor has an active SignalR connection
      When the connection is lost due to a network interruption
      Then the withAutomaticReconnect policy triggers immediately on the first retry
      And retries after 2 seconds on the second attempt
      And retries after 10 seconds on the third attempt
      And retries every 30 seconds thereafter
      And a reconnecting event is logged during the reconnection attempts
      And a reconnected event is logged upon successful re-connection

    @regression @p2
    Scenario: Sincronizacion de mensaje enviado entre componentes via evento local
      Given an advisor sends a WhatsApp message from the conversations panel component
      When the send action completes
      Then the emitirMensajeEnviadoLocal method emits a MensajeEnviadoLocal event
      And the whatsapp component receives the event and updates the chat UI
      And both components show the message without a page reload
